checkpoint.text: A sandbag wall with a rusted oil-drum fire blocks the road into the settlement. Two guards in mismatched armor block your path, one resting a hand on a machete. The taller one squints at you and asks your business.

waved_through.text: The guard waves you through with a grunt. Beyond the barricade, a small supply cache sits near the guardhouse — a locked box and a crate left open. One of the guards offers you leftover rations from the night watch.

watch_reward.text: You spend hours on the wall, cold and alert. Near dawn a shadow at the perimeter turns out to be a stray dog. The lead guard finds you still standing at post and hands over a sealed kit from the settlement's emergency stores.

guard_suspicion.text: The shorter guard grabs your collar and searches you roughly before the other waves him off. You lose nothing but time and pride.

shaken_down.text: The guard pockets your scrap and holds out his hand again. You pay double or you don't get through.

raider_probe.text: Three figures test the wire at the east corner. In the scramble one of them lands a blow across your ribs before retreating into the dark.
